name: Burn Reward Systeam
description: Burn is a decentralized technology team comprised of early DeFi developers, smart contract engineers, and blockchain security experts who have participated in code audits and economic model design for several well-known deflationary projects. This time, they have joined forces with top 100 community leaders worldwide (covering Southeast Asia, Europe, America, the Middle East, and other regions, with a cumulative user base exceeding 500,000) to launch the Burn project, aiming to create a truly fair, sustainable, and community-driven burning-based dividend ecosystem. It pioneers a closed-loop model where burning equals mining and dividends equal returns, making each burn a perpetual mining opportunity.
